description:
Handle MDI 418/maintenance and transient outages gracefully across onboarding and dashboard flows.

**Scope**
- MDI client maps 418 and outage responses to typed errors.
- Onboarding shows a calm pending/retry state if MDI submission or URL creation is unavailable.
- Retryable operations can be queued via SQS/DLQ where needed.
- Dashboard shows a patient-safe banner/status without implying clinical data loss.

**Acceptance**
- Simulated 418 produces the intended UI state and no duplicate MDI case/patient creation.
- Queued retry eventually succeeds exactly once when MDI recovers.
- Logs and alarms identify provider outage without logging clinical payloads.
title: MDI maintenance/unavailable handling
